selectorNormalization: replace common generated ids like #ui-id-23 with wildcards
keep only the last one to two selector segments to reduce page-specific parent wrappers
purpose: show recurring issues once with all affected pages underneath
preserve page-level evidence for audit follow-up
surface candidate shared components separately from per-page failures

ruleSummary.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
ruleSummary.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

ruleSummary.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color
ruleSummary.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation

ruleSummary.help: autocomplete attribute must be used correctly
ruleSummary.description: Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field

ruleSummary.help: Inline text spacing must be adjustable with custom stylesheets
ruleSummary.description: Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets

recurringIssues.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
recurringIssues.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
failureSummaries: Fix any of the following: Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.85 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #00b140, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

recurringIssues.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color
recurringIssues.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
failureSummaries: Fix any of the following: The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.85:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #00b140, surrounding text: #ffffff) The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

recurringIssues.help: autocomplete attribute must be used correctly
recurringIssues.description: Ensure the autocomplete attribute is correct and suitable for the form field
recurringIssues.sampleHtml: <input class="form-control leadForm_formInput__yDeJz phone " placeholder="(___)-___-____" autocomplete="nope" id="*" type="text" name="phone" inputmode="text">
failureSummaries: Fix all of the following: the autocomplete attribute is incorrectly formatted

recurringIssues.help: Inline text spacing must be adjustable with custom stylesheets
recurringIssues.description: Ensure that text spacing set through style attributes can be adjusted with custom stylesheets
failureSummaries: Fix all of the following: letter-spacing in the style attribute must not use !important, or be at 0.12em (current 0em) line-height in the style attribute must not use !important, or be at 1.5em (current 1.4em)

failureSummaries: Fix any of the following: Element does not have an alt attribute aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

recurringIssues.description: Ensure every form element has a label
recurringIssues.sampleHtml: <input class="form-control leadForm_formInput__yDeJz zipcode " maxlength="5" placeholder="" id="*" type="text" name="zipCode">
failureSummaries: Fix any of the following: Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label> Element does not have an explicit <label> aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element has an empty placeholder attribute Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
